name: Party Citrus Fish- Crockpot
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the fish fillets with salt and pepper to taste.
2. Place the seasoned fish in the crockpot.
3. Add onion, parsley, lemon rind, orange rind, and oil on top of the fish.
4. Cover and cook on low for 1 1/2 hours.
5. Garnish with orange and lemon slices before serving.
